phrases.text_local: Onde está o painel de partidas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW peye-NEHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o painel de partidas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW peye-NEHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the departure board.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the departure board.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW peye-NEHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o painel de partidas.

phrases.text_local: Onde encontro o cais de embarque do meu autocarro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo AW KEYESH DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih DOO MEHOO ow-too-KAH-roo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para os cais de embarque e consulte o painel de partidas para confirmar o cais específico.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEYESH DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih EH koong-SOOW-tih AW peye-NEHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh PUH-ruh koong-fee-ruh-MAHR AW KEYESH shpeh-SEE-fee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the boarding platforms and check the departure board to confirm the specific platform.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the boarding platforms and check the departure board to confirm the specific platform.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh OOSH KEYESH DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih EH koong-SOOW-tih AW peye-NEHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh PUH-ruh koong-fee-ruh-MAHR AW KEYESH shpeh-SEE-fee-koo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para os cais de embarque e consulte o painel de partidas para confirmar o cais específico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Pode me informar onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-kah ah SAH-lah jee-es-PEH-rah klee-mah-tee-ZAH-dah
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese transport staff prioritize brevity and precise spatial references. Directions typically reference fixed architectural landmarks.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a sala de espera.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the waiting room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the waiting room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a sala de espera.

phrases.text_local: Onde está a banca de jornais e snacks?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee es-TAH ah BAN-kah dji zhor-NAISH ee SNACKS
phrases.cultural_note: Banca de jornais is the standard term for newsstands in Portugal, often located near ticket counters for passenger convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à bilheteira principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the main ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the main ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto à bilheteira principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The waiting room is air-conditioned, a common amenity in Portuguese bus terminals.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Sala de espera climatizada.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh klee-muh-tee-ZAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the air-conditioned waiting room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the air-conditioned waiting room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh klee-muh-tee-ZAH-duh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Sala de espera climatizada.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a banca de jornais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH BAHNNG-kuh DIH zhoo-ruh-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: The newsstand also sells snacks, useful for travelers waiting for buses.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para banca de jornais.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh BAHNNG-kuh DIH zhoo-ruh-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the newsstand.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the newsstand.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh BAHNNG-kuh DIH zhoo-ruh-NEYESH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para banca de jornais.
